candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus reports conv>=100% but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0% (no historical analog), suppress entries — the consensus is mechanically extreme but has zero empirical track record at that configuration.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: A 100% conviction reading with zero green_matches means every indicator agrees in the live snapshot but the system has never seen this exact configuration resolve profitably in memory. USDJPY (14/30 bull, conv=100%, hist_hr=0%) and AUDNZD (conv=75%, hist_hr=0%) are precisely the safe-haven pairs L8 warns about: unanimous directional agreement on a rate-sensitive pair usually reflects a transient flow shock (carry unwind / haven bid), not a durable institutional position — so the crowd is fully committed at exactly the moment mean-reversion risk peaks.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus.conviction >= 0.95 and consensus.green_matches == 0 and consensus.hist_hr <= 0.05: veto_entry()  # require at least one historical green analog before trusting extreme conviction
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Filters anti-edge USDJPY/AUDNZD entries; expected to lift win rate by removing zero-track-record signals, modeled Sharpe contribution +0.02 to +0.03 via reduced variance of losers.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Live consensus shows USDJPY dir=LONG conv=100% hist_hr=0% and AUDNZD dir=LONG conv=75% hist_hr=0% — both with green_matches=0, while SHORT pairs (GBPUSD hist_hr=69%, AUDUSD hist_hr=72%) have strong historical hit rates. The zero-hr longs are the structurally untrusted signals.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 sets the USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate at 13 for a bull market; with VIX now 18.63 and falling and regime UNKNOWN/MOMENTUM rather than clean bull, the fixed-13 threshold may be mis-calibrated — worth re-validating whether the gate should flex with regime confidence rather than stay static.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in the last 7 days with regime=UNKNOWN and TradingView providing 0 signals (internal-only sizing at 75%) — the system is correctly in a low-conviction holding state, so no execution-level decay, but the empty decision log means harvest-only lessons are the only validatable path right now.
